title: Tunisian Tagine Tart
description: A sweet and savory pastry filled with a tangy tagine filling, made with flaky pastry and topped with a sweet icing. Perfect for a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most spice stores or online

instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the pastry to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a small bowl, mix together the tagine, sugar, and tunisian spice blend.
Pour the tagine mixture into the pastry shell.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Transfer the tart to a wire rack to cool completely.
Once the tart has cooled, drizzle with a sweet icing made from powdered sugar and water.
